title: Coatzacoalcos, Veracruz — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Coatzacoalcos is a city in Veracruz with a population of 319,187. Major oil and industrial port city in Veracruz with a strategic location on the Coatzacoalcos River.
